Class UserInterface

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.UserInterface
public class UserInterface extends Object
Acts as the central manager for the game session.

This class coordinates the interaction between the game model (DongeonGame), the player (Hero), and the various controllers that manage specific room logic. It handles the initialization of the game state and the transition between floors.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserInterface

      public UserInterface(String username)
      Initializes a new game session. Creates the first floor, initializes the hero with starting items (Gold, Weapons), and places the hero in the dungeon.
      Parameters:
      username - The name of the player.

  • Method Details

    • hero

      public Hero hero()
      Gets the current hero instance.
      Returns:
      The hero.

    • floor

      public Floor floor()
      Gets the current floor layout.
      Returns:
      The floor model.

    • updateHeroAfterMove

      public void updateHeroAfterMove(Coordinate dest, com.github.forax.zen.ApplicationContext ctx, FloorView view, com.github.forax.zen.ScreenInfo info)
      Moves the hero to a destination and triggers the room event if successful.

      This method is called by the main loop when the user clicks on the map. It delegates pathfinding to the DongeonGame model.

      Parameters:
      dest - The target coordinate on the map.
      ctx - The graphics context (to pass to controllers).
      view - The floor view (unused here but kept for API consistency).
      info - Screen info (resolution).
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if dest is null.

    • runRoom

      public void runRoom(Coordinate coord, com.github.forax.zen.ApplicationContext ctx)
      Identifies the room at the given coordinate and launches its specific controller.
      Parameters:
      coord - The coordinate of the room to run.
      ctx - The application context.

    • dungeonTransition

      public void dungeonTransition()
      Handles the transition to the next dungeon floor/level. Increases difficulty, generates a new floor, and respawns the hero.
